name: BigBear.ai Inc. Common Stock
summary: BigBear.ai Inc. is an artificial intelligence (AI) solutions and analytics company that provides AI-powered decision intelligence solutions to government and commercial customers. The company develops and deploys AI solutions for areas such as cybersecurity, supply chain optimization, and autonomous systems, and is headquartered in Columbia, Maryland. BigBear.ai combines AI, machine learning, and data analytics to provide actionable insights to its clients.
